# Vendor Preview Assets

These files are deployable browser assets, not source references.

- `static-print-references/`: mirrored STL assets for curated static print previews.
- `fan-preview/`: preview-only fan CAD derivatives for visualizing purchased fans.
- `scale-reference/`: scale-reference meshes used only in the browser preview.

Raw upstream downloads and research artifacts belong in `references/`, not here.
